title: Special Education: Video/Audio Monitoring
description: Conroe ISD uses video and audio monitoring in certain special education settings to help ensure the safety and well-being of students with disabilities. The policy outlines when and how recording equipment may be used in these classrooms, who can access the recordings, and how that footage is stored and protected. Parents and community members can refer to this policy to understand the safeguards in place for some of the district's most vulnerable students.
